---
name: aidevme-blog-content-social-preview-image-generation-prompt
description: Generate a social preview image for blog content
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Generate a social preview banner image using the following constraints in order of priority:

1. **Canvas**: 1280×640 px, 16:9 aspect ratio.
2. **Background**: Deep charcoal (#0d1117), dark-themed.
3. **Left side**: The text "aidevme.com" in bold, modern sans-serif, white. Directly below it, "blog content" in a smaller size using a cyan accent color.
4. **Right side**: A stylized composition of Markdown document cards arranged in a layered, slightly elevated perspective, with low-opacity code syntax highlighting visible inside the cards.
5. **Connecting elements**: Thin, luminous cyan lines connecting the cards in a node-and-edge network structure, visually representing a content pipeline.
6. **Color palette**: Deep charcoal background (#0d1117), electric indigo (#6366f1) and cyan (#22d3ee) accents, white (#ffffff) text.
7. **Style**: Minimalist and modern, tech-forward aesthetic. No people.
